title: Memory, Context Windows, Compaction, and Retrieval
description: Keep a long-running agent grounded without unlimited history. Learners cumulatively produce a context and durable-memory policy through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Keep only current decision-relevant state in working context.
Store stable facts with provenance, scope, freshness, and deletion rules.
Retrieve the smallest authoritative evidence set for the next decision.
